validationClaim: Phase 5 continuity assembly and one coordinator cycle now have a measured baseline instead of a guessed cost story.

measurementMethod.continuityAssembly: Measured from live assembleContinuityContext(...) outputs and formatted with formatContinuityForPrompt(...).
measurementMethod.tokenCounter: Measured with the repo token-counter helper; provider-native if configured, otherwise char_fallback.
measurementMethod.coordinatorCycle: Measured from one live /orchestrator-run plus /orchestrator-status cycle in a fresh eval workspace.

scenario.cycleObjective: Export a session digest for the current workspace.

executionLane.observation: The MVP execution lane is local-logic only, so this baseline observed no provider billing or external rate-limit surface.

reviewLane.observation: The MVP review lane stays on the local CLI path in the saved baseline; no API fallback was required or observed.

notes: Continuity tokens are a sub-budget measurement for the assembler, not the total end-to-end prompt budget.
Coordinator cycle write counts include control-plane and orchestrator state plus the exported session digest.

referenceBudgets.runtimeStory: One local coordinator cycle should stay understandable in writes and cheap enough to inspect before Phase 6 expands provider scope.
